title: Elliott Heavy Duty Household and Maintenance Rubber Gloves, Medium Size Gloves with breathable flock Lining and non-slip grip, One pair of Black Gloves
features: EXTRA STRONG: High quality and extra thickness rubber gloves to give extra protection and support when performing all types of tasks
FLOCK LINED: Our Rubber gloves are flock lined to make the gloves more breathable and comfortable to use
EASY GRIP: With a grip design these gloves will give you extra grip when you re performing all tasking from Washing up, Carrying goods or performing general cleaning tasks
LONG CUFFS: The cuff length of the gloves are longer than normal which will help keep your hands clean and dry
COLOUR: These gloves come in a Black colour and perfect for any Cleaning, Maintenance or decorating task
description: From the brand Previous page Elliott is a British cleaning brand with over 65 years of experience. Founded in 1948, we began with traditional brushware, including scrubbing brushes for floors and stairs. Today, we offer stylish, efficient products for modern households, helping you achieve a spotless home. Laundry Pegs Clothes Lines Wooden Brushes Spray Bottles Dustpan and Brushes Dusters Brooms Wooden Broom Heads Window Squeeges Toilet Brushes and Plungers Next page
